title: clusia ovigera
intro: Clusia ovigera, also known as the "clusia tree" or "clusia," is a tropical plant native to Central and South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting wound healing and improving digestive health. The herbal preparations of Clusia ovigera typically involve the bark, leaves, or roots being used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
